source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 6 - Markpoints > 6.3 - How to Use Markpoints

steps.action: We will assume Markpoint #2 (M2) has already been created beforehand with the Target Designate method mentioned earlier.
Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
On HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page, select desired markpoint using the OSBs (Option Select Button) next to UP or DOWN arrows.
Press OSB next to WYPT (boxed = selected)
Press on OSB next to WPSDG to designate waypoint/markpoint as the target point (boxed = selected)
Targeting pod will automatically slew to the selected waypoint/markpoint. 6 - MARKPOINTS
Use the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) Aft/Fwd/Left/Right controls to slew the targeting pod reticle over the desired target if adjustments are required.
You can then use a weapon of your choice like a Maverick and fire it on the designated point (markpoint in WPDSG).
